concerns.text: FR-009 (Multicollinearity Check) is listed in the plan's FR/SC mapping but has no corresponding task in tasks.md. T037 implements VIF check, but FR-009 is not explicitly tagged or described as the task covering this requirement. A task must explicitly cover FR-009 to ensure the requirement is implemented.

FR-010 (Physical Validity Filter) is mapped in the plan but lacks a dedicated task. T017 implements 'physical validity filter', but FR-010 is not explicitly tagged. While T017 likely covers it, the absence of an explicit [FR-010] tag or clear description linking T017 to FR-010 creates a coverage gap for this specific requirement.

SC-005 requires calculating R² of a power-law fit. T038 mentions 'Implement power-law fit (R² calculation)', but the task description is vague and does not explicitly reference SC-005. The plan's FR/SC mapping links SC-005 to T038, but the task itself lacks the explicit tag or clear description to confirm coverage of the specific success criterion.

Task T007 creates entities in 'code/utils/models.py', but the plan.md Project Structure does not list 'models.py'. This is a minor inconsistency in file naming/structure that should be resolved to ensure the task aligns with the planned architecture.
